prompt.text:
帮我在 NocoBase 复刻这个原型:AI 本地化翻译工作流。参考原型(OSS 模板):https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/71-ai-localization-workflow.html

[环境] NocoBase env `maxbench02`(nb CLI 已配)。所有写操作一律 `nb api <...> -e maxbench02 -y`(始终显式 -e,带 -y)。
**先把 `nocobase-prototype-repro` skill 读完(SKILL.md + references/ 全部:spec-template / block-recipes / gotchas / visual-loop)再动手。**
原型 HTML 末尾内嵌 `<script type="application/nb-spec+json">` 权威规格(集合/字段/枚举/页面/招牌区块)——先 curl 抓原型读这个 spec,它是唯一事实源,严格照建。集合前缀统一用 `ai71_`(本实例里多个原型共存,前缀务必隔离)。
端到端**完整**搭:数据建模一次过 + 英文种子(覆盖每个枚举/状态各 ≥1 行,密度足够)+ 每个集合的列表页(Filter+Add+Table+View 抽屉,子表用 associationName+sourceId 自动按父过滤)+ 招牌视图/看板(按 region→原生块 映射,别清一色表格)。
[视觉自查] Playwright 全新无缓存浏览器打开 `/admin/<pageUid>`;token 按 skill 的 visual-loop 注入 localStorage NOCOBASE_TOKEN(env `maxbench02` 的 token 可从 nb 配置/登录取;appslib 可 UI 登录 admin@nocobase.com / ***REDACTED***)。截图 ↔ 原型对照,对齐 **≥8 成**才算完成;招牌区块为空/报错绝不算完成。框住招牌主体,别出现大片白屏。
全程自主多轮推进,不要停下来问我。
最后报告:① collection 清单 ② 招牌页 pageUid ③ 必须写明一行 `Self-Score: X/10` ④ 与原型的对比观察 ⑤ 踩的坑。

The build is complete and verified end-to-end. Here is the final report.

# FINAL REPORT — AI Localization Workflow (LinguaFlow) → NocoBase `maxbench02`

Prototype #71 reproduced end-to-end. The OSS template URL 404s; I used the real prototype shipped locally at `app-library-bench/web/71-ai-localization-workflow.html` (no embedded `nb-spec` — the data model was derived from the rendered HTML + its `STRINGS` seed array). All collections prefixed `ai71_`.

## ① Collections (6 + relations, all-English seed, every enum branch)
| Collection | Title field | Rows | Key fields / enums |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ai71_strings` (main) | string_key | 15 | status (review/flagged/approved/**draft**), routing (human_review/rework_needed/ai_auto_approved/approved_by_reviewer), confidence/fluency/term_flags, source/target text, ai_reason, updated_at |
| `ai71_locales` | name | 9 | code, flag, mqm_score, coverage_pct, status (active/paused) |
| `ai71_reviewers` | name | 7 | role (linguist/lead/auto), specialty, email |
| `ai71_string_tags` | label | 58 | kind (pass/warn/info) — o2m child of strings |
| `ai71_glossary` | source_term | 10 | entry_type (glossary/tm_match), match_pct, status (approved/pending) |
| `ai71_activities` | message | 8 | event_type (auto_approved/flagged/glossary_synced/detected/drafted), count, occurred_at |

Relations: strings→locale (m2o), strings→reviewer (m2o), strings→tags (o2m), glossary→locale (m2o), activities→locale (m2o). Every enum branch + both relation directions covered.

transcript.text:
Base directory for this skill: ~/.claude/skills/nocobase-prototype-repro

# Goal

Turn a prototype + a one-line ask into a faithful NocoBase app. This is a **meta / orchestration skill** — it sequences `nocobase-data-modeling` + `nocobase-ui-builder` + `nocobase-app-discipline` and adds the two things that decide fidelity: a **region → native-block mapping** and a **visual convergence loop**. It does not re-teach the CLI; it routes to the sibling skills for mechanics and owns only the reproduction-specific judgment.

# When to use / Non-Goals

**Hard gate (check before selecting this skill):** there must be an actual prototype in hand — an HTML file, a screenshot, or a link to one — that you are matching against. No prototype, no fidelity gap → this is **not** the skill; a plain "build me an app / a page" request belongs to `nocobase-app-discipline` (whole system) or `nocobase-ui-builder` (single page/edit). Do not let this skill shadow the normal build flow.

**Use when:**
- The user gives a prototype (HTML file, link, screenshot, or a `public/prototypes/...` URL to curl) and wants it reproduced in NocoBase.
- A page already exists but the user says it's monotone / ugly / doesn't match the prototype / a region should be a list/card/kanban instead of a table — i.e. there is a **visual target and a fidelity gap**.

**Non-Goals — hand off, do not do here:**
- Pure data modeling (collections/fields/relations with no visual target) → `nocobase-data-modeling`.
- Workflows / automations → `nocobase-workflow-manage`. ACL / permissions → `nocobase-acl-manage`. Plugin work → `nocobase-plugin-development`.
- A localized UI edit with **no visual target and no fidelity gap** (move one field, rename an action, tweak a reaction) → `nocobase-ui-builder` **directly**. This skill is only worth its overhead when you are matching a prototype's look/behavior; for a mechanical surface edit, skip straight to ui-builder.
- Whole-page authoring from a business sentence with **no** prototype → author a quick prototype first ([prototype-authoring.md](references/prototype-authoring.md)), then this skill; or if the user just wants a generic page, that's `nocobase-ui-builder`'s `applyBlueprint`.

# Router — task shape → read first

Hit one route, read its "first" doc, and only open the "then" docs when that route is still not enough. Sibling skills own the mechanics; the reference files here own the reproduction-specific judgment.

# FINAL REPORT — AI Localization Workflow (LinguaFlow) → NocoBase `maxbench02`

Prototype #71 reproduced end-to-end. The OSS template URL 404s; I used the real prototype shipped locally at `app-library-bench/web/71-ai-localization-workflow.html` (no embedded `nb-spec` — the data model was derived from the rendered HTML + its `STRINGS` seed array). All collections prefixed `ai71_`.

## ① Collections (6 + relations, all-English seed, every enum branch)
| Collection | Title field | Rows | Key fields / enums |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ai71_strings` (main) | string_key | 15 | status (review/flagged/approved/**draft**), routing (human_review/rework_needed/ai_auto_approved/approved_by_reviewer), confidence/fluency/term_flags, source/target text, ai_reason, updated_at |
| `ai71_locales` | name | 9 | code, flag, mqm_score, coverage_pct, status (active/paused) |
| `ai71_reviewers` | name | 7 | role (linguist/lead/auto), specialty, email |
| `ai71_string_tags` | label | 58 | kind (pass/warn/info) — o2m child of strings |
| `ai71_glossary` | source_term | 10 | entry_type (glossary/tm_match), match_pct, status (approved/pending) |
| `ai71_activities` | message | 8 | event_type (auto_approved/flagged/glossary_synced/detected/drafted), count, occurred_at |

Relations: strings→locale (m2o), strings→reviewer (m2o), strings→tags (o2m), glossary→locale (m2o), activities→locale (m2o). Every enum branch + both relation directions covered.

**Pages** (menu group "AI Localization"): 6 CRUD list pages (Filter + Add + Table + View/Edit/Delete drawer) — Translation Strings `a4ye5rczkld`, Languages `6hmn9tbt2mv`, Reviewers `ju9homb9f8n`, Glossary & TM `s7o5lvmpw4q`, AI Activity `sgc3hlwcxax`, Assessment Tags `wcfma8qmb7e`. The Strings View drawer shows **Details + AI-assessment-tags sub-table auto-filtered to the parent** via `associatedRecords` (verified: 4 tags scoped to the clicked string).

## ② Signature page
**Translation Review Queue — pageSchemaUid `a6yese68jn1`**  (`/admin/a6yese68jn1`)
Native-first composition: KPI strip (JSBlock, 4 live cards) → status-pill bar + locale/confidence dropdowns + Re-run AI Draft (JSBlock, cross-block-filters the queue) → **native List + JSField rich card** queue (locale chip, key, status pill, color-coded confidence badge, route; click → native drawer) → featured review pane (JSBlock: AI-assessment banner, tags, source/target diff, Confidence/Fluency/Terminology bars, Approve/Apply AI Fix/Flag) → Locale Coverage (JSBlock: SVG donut + per-locale MQM bars) → **native List + JSField** AI Activity timeline.

## ③ Self-Score: 8.5/10

## ④ Comparison vs prototype
- **Matched:** page title, KPI strip layout/labels/sparklines, status pills with counts, locale+confidence dropdowns, Re-run button, the String Queue card anatomy + ordering (most-recent first), the entire featured review pane incl. action buttons, the coverage donut (center %, 4-color ring, legend with counts/%) + MQM bars, the activity feed icons/colors, and the click→native drawer with the tags sub-table. Colors follow the prototype's semantic language (blue/green/amber/red).
- **Live vs mock numbers differ** (KPI 8/2/85.1/3 vs 14/312/94.6/7; donut counts) — correct behavior: computed live from the 15 seeded strings, not hardcoded.
- **Intentional adaptations:** locale "flags" render as locale **codes** (JA/DE/FR…) because the SES sandbox renders emoji as tofu; LinguaFlow sidebar branding is replaced by NocoBase's own nav.
- **Known layout tradeoff:** the prototype stacks Review→Coverage→Activity in one tall right rail beside a tall queue. NocoBase's tab grid is row-based and can't row-span a tall left column beside a 3-block stacked rail, so I used a 2×2 (queue|review / coverage|activity). All regions render with the right block type and no white space.

## ⑤ Pitfalls hit
- OSS template URL is dead (OSS `NoSuchKey`) → used the local prototype; **no embedded nb-spec** so the model wa
